Title: Security update for the Linux Kernel (Live Patch 79 for SUSE Linux Enterprise 12 SP5)

Notes.Text: Security update for the Linux Kernel (Live Patch 79 for SUSE Linux Enterprise 12 SP5)
Notes.Title: Topic

Notes.Text:
This update for the SUSE Linux Enterprise kernel 4.12.14-122.299 fixes one security issue

The following security issue was fixed:

- CVE-2026-31431: crypto: algif_aead - Revert to operating out-of-place (bsc#1263689).
Notes.Title: Details

Notes.Text: The CVRF data is provided by SUSE under the Creative Commons License 4.0 with Attribution (CC-BY-4.0).
Notes.Title: Terms of Use

Relationships.RelatesToProductReference: SUSE Linux Enterprise Live Patching 12 SP5

Vulnerabilities.Description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

crypto: algif_aead - Revert to operating out-of-place

This mostly reverts commit 72548b093ee3 except for the copying of
the associated data.

There is no benefit in operating in-place in algif_aead since the
source and destination come from different mappings.  Get rid of
all the complexity added for in-place operation and just copy the
AD directly.
